content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed bundle.rs (validation modes, dependency graph, summary, render enhancements), contracts.rs (validate_generated wiring), template_catalog.rs (prompt enhancements), and all updated test fixtures. The dual-mode validation correctly preserves backward compatibility for persisted bundles via validate() while strictly enforcing the planner contract via validate_generated(). Cycle detection, dependency depth, AC coverage summary, deferred-items detection, and render_plan_md sections are all functionally correct and well-tested (49 bundle unit tests + 1025 lib tests pass). The new public helpers (infer_workstream_order, validate_dependency_graph, summarize_bundle) match the bead spec. extract_milestone_bundle_handoff still calls validate() for legacy compatibility. No correctness gaps, no safety problems, no significant maintainability risks. The only minor observation (duplicate covered_by-empty check at lines 354-358 that is now unreachable) is purely cosmetic — the validation behavior is correct and tested.

## Amendments

None.
